faqs.question: Why are ant problems so common in Coney Island?
faqs.answer: Coney Island's coastal humidity, sandy soil, older building infrastructure, and high concentration of food establishments create ideal conditions for ant colonies. The area's mix of residential and commercial properties, combined with moisture from ocean air, attracts various ant species including odorous house ants, pavement ants, and carpenter ants.

This includes inspection, treatment, and follow-up service to ensure complete elimination. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
